name: Chiperoo Bars
recipeInstructions:
Melt the shortening. Stir in brown sugar and vanilla, mixing well until cool.
Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt. Add eggs one at a time to the shortening mixture, beating well after each addition. Blend in dry ingredients. Stir in chocolate chips and nuts. Spread into a greased 15x10x1-inch pan or use a 13x9x2-inch pan for thicker bars. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes. When almost cool, cut into bars.
